They'll present all kinds of material ranging from analyses of the various competitors to confidential information on them! In addition, the radio show "A Dragon Dive Into Your Hearts" will present letters from its listeners!

title: It's... Champion Time! (1)
overview: On the morning of Leon and Diantha's battle, Ash and Cynthia run into two young fans who are full of questions about selecting Pokémon partners.

title: Bewitch, Battle, and Bewilder! (2)
overview: In the semifinals, the Sinnoh region champion Cynthia battles the very first Alola region champion Ash for the chance to take on the undefeated Leon.

title: Valor: A Strategic Part of Battling! (3)
overview: As the epic battle continues, underdog Ash struggles to keep up with champion Cynthia's aggressive strategy — but he won't go down without a fight.

title: Whittle While You Work! (4)
overview: The battle rages on, but Ash is down to his last Pokémon: Lucario. Can the power of their bond see them through to a victory over the Sinnoh champion?

title: GO FOR DREAM! Go's Road to Mew!!
overview: A suspicious shadow is sneaking up on Go's Smartphone Rotom in the hotel room he and Satoshi are staying at in Shoot City in the Galar region... We'll be shedding light on the info on Go's Pokémon and the top secret data on Project Mew contained within?! In addition, the radio show "A Blaze Kick After School" will be doing a special on childhood friends!!

title: Just a Scone's Throw from Here!
overview: On the eve of the finals, Ash and Goh enjoy a day off in town and run into a group of Nickit who've become popular for teaching other Pokémon to behave.

title: Climax! The Night Before the Decisive Battle! Satoshi VS Dande!!
overview: It's time for the Masters Tournament Finals, which will determine who's the best in the world, and PWCS News is doing a special that will present the finals the world is eagerly awaiting in greater detail than anywhere else! The special will provide a thorough coverage of not only highlights of Satoshi and Dande's battles, but also of the various encounters between the two! In addition, the special has obtained some exclusive news it's going to break?!

title: A Flood of Torrential Gains! (1)
overview: While Goh answers an emergency call from Project Mew, Ash heads into the finals of the Masters Eight Tournament, where Leon requests a full power battle.

title: Toying with Your Motions! (2)
overview: With each competitor down to their final five Pokémon, the battle wages. Ash fights to get an advantage over Leon, who effortlessly sets the pace.

title: Paring Pokémon While Parrying! (3)
overview: The fierce battle to determine who the strongest trainer is continues. Will Ash manage to see himself through to the ultimate victory?

title: Partners in Time! (4)
overview: The mysterious appearance of a legendary Eternatus above Wyndon Stadium grants Ash and Leon a bonus round, where it comes down to partner versus partner.

title: The Mew from Here!
overview: After picking up psychic energy signals, the Chasers set out to scale treacherous Table Mountain in search of Mew... but find surprises along the way.

title: In the Palms of Our Hands!
overview: On Faraway Island, the Chasers make a startling discovery and find themselves transported to a mysterious realm, where Goh connects with an old friend.

title: Heroes Unite!
overview: Goh has a new ambition to become a trainer worthy of partnering with Mew — but he's not sure how to broach the topic while camping with Ash and Chloe.

title: This Could Be the Start of Something Big!
overview: An epic battle with a legendary Pokémon reignites the fire in both Ash and Goh's hearts. But before they set out on new journeys, they must say goodbye.

title: The Road Most Traveled!
overview: While walking through the woods, Ash takes a random path that leads him to exciting encounters with many different types of Pokémon — and enemies.

title: A Fated Face-Off!
overview: Misty believes she's connected to a wild Clauncher by fate. Ash thinks his Corphish called dibs on it first. The only solution? A fishing battle!

title: Must Be Our Heroes and the Witch!
overview: To cheer up a heartsick Brock, Ash and his friends take him to a nearby flower field, where he gets lost chasing after a tricky Psychic-type Pokémon.

title: Bearing Down Easy!
overview: On a snowy mountaintop, Ash and the team try to help a gloomy Beartic by encouraging it to regain control of its ice powers.

title: A Squad's Worth of Passion!
overview: Ash and friends decide to cheer on their old pal Squirtle at the Firefighting Squad Show, but the famous Pokémon's managers won't let the group say hi.

title: The Same Moon, Now and Forever!
overview: When Team Rocket causes Pikachu to get separated from the rest of his group, Ash relies on their strong connection to track down his best friend.

title: Ride, Lapras, Ride!
overview: A friendly Lapras takes Ash to a remote island, where a fellow Water-type needs the trainer's help. But Ash can't rescue the trapped Pokémon alone.

title: Getting to the Heart of It All!
overview: When a supernatural entity starts stealing heart-shaped objects from houses in a small town, Ash, Brock and Misty team up to solve the mystery.

title: Rocket Revengers!
overview: Team Rocket goes on a revenge mission to capture more Pokémon for their boss. The first step? Sending a Mime Jr. to gain Pikachu's trust.

title: Ash and Latios!
overview: Latias takes Ash on a journey to figure out what happened to Latios. But rescuing the legendary Pokémon becomes a bigger battle than they bargained for.

title: The Rainbow and the Pokémon Master!
overview: As the group splits up, Ash and Pikachu return to Pallet Town, where they get some much-needed relaxation — before Team Rocket shows up.
